pi_items.verified_value: 3650 days = 10 years exactly (ignoring leap years); accounting for leap years ≈ 9.998 years ≈ 10 years
pi_items.source: Mathematical calculation: 3650 / 365 = 10; with leap years (365.25 days/year): 3650 / 365.25 ≈ 9.998 years

pi_items.source: GitHub: microsoft/sql-server-samples - official Microsoft repository with maintained releases

privileged_info_summary: AdventureWorks2022 is Microsoft's official OLTP sample database for SQL Server 2022, available at https://github.com/Microsoft/sql-server-samples/releases/download/adventureworks/AdventureWorks2022.bak. The HumanResources schema contains four tables: Department (with DepartmentID, Name, GroupName), Employee (with BusinessEntityID, Gender, HireDate), EmployeeDepartmentHistory (with EndDate NULL for current assignments), and EmployeePayHistory (with Rate and RateChangeDate for pay history). SOC code 11-3121.00 officially maps to 'Human Resources Managers' (not 'HR Analytics Manager' as metadata claims), classified under Management Occupations. The tenure threshold of 3650 days correctly represents 10 years (365 × 10). The task uses Azure Data Studio connected to SQL Server 2022 Docker container.
